purpose: Govern macro-side pattern routing readiness so future microcosm reconstruction selects coherent organs instead of isolated mined pattern rows.

route_readiness_contract.hard_floor: No mined pattern row is a standalone future leaf until a selector proves organ membership, prerequisites, direct import or regression-wrapper contract, proof or validator boundary, and anti-claim.
selector_must_reject: macro_only rows without direct import target, deletion disposition, or exact secret/credential exclusion
fixture_only rows that substitute for non-secret macro substrate
publication wrappers without proof and authority gates
formal lab rows without split policy and repair receipts
cockpit rows without imported source-backed typed views and render checks

hard_errors: route readiness audit source ledger count or hash does not match extracted_patterns_ledger.jsonl
audit_summary counts drift from companion overlays
router duplicate pattern refs are not listed in intentional_router_overlaps
routing overlays reference pattern ids absent from the extracted ledger
selector contract allows pattern row selection or omits required companion overlays
fixture specs lack imported substrate target, regression-wrapper inputs, negative cases, validator/check, or anti-claim
dependency DAG edge references an undefined organ node
hard_no_standalone pattern ids are marked selectable
warnings: future extensions should keep weak or macro-only families folded unless direct import targets, exact secret/credential exclusions, and anti-claim gates are added
